# Mukta × उमेध — work built with this font

[Umedh](https://umedh.in) (उमेध — a Marathi business-intelligence daily) sets its
Devanagari UI, body and now its **auto-generated social/OG share cards** in **Mukta**.

## Work: Umedh OG Image Generator
A Next.js `ImageResponse` (satori) route renders a branded 1200×630 share card for
every story that has no uploaded art, so every link has a clean WhatsApp/social
preview. The Devanagari is set in Mukta (vendored from this font, SIL OFL 1.1).

Source: `src/app/api/og/[pillar]/[slug]/route.tsx` in the Umedh repo.

### Sample output (regenerated by `scripts/og-mukta-showcase.mjs`)

| Section | Image | Size |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| लोकांसाठी | `showcase/og-lokansaathi.png` | 39 KB |
| शेअर बाजार | `showcase/og-share-bazar.png` | 33 KB |
| वाढवण बंदर | `showcase/og-vadhvan-bandhar.png` | 34 KB |
| MSME उद्योग | `showcase/og-msme.png` | 30 KB |

## Binaries used
`binaries/Mukta-Regular.ttf`, `binaries/Mukta-Bold.ttf` (Devanagari), with `binaries/OFL.txt`.

_Mukta © EkType, licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1._
